role: ALAD — Adversarially Learned Anomaly Detection; encoder+BiGAN+dual discriminators in data+latent space; closest prior work on dual-score AAE
ARCADE — Adversarially Regularized Convolutional Autoencoder for Network Anomaly Detection; adversarial AE for network flows
ALADAEN — Active Learning + Attention + Adversarial Dual AutoEncoder for APT anomaly detection; closest to full proposed pipeline
ARAE — Adaptive Robust AutoEncoder; multi-head attention + adversarial AE + adaptive multi-indicator scoring on KDD99/NSL-KDD
Wavelet + AAE for network intrusion; adversarial AE outperforms vanilla AE on encrypted TLS traffic
VAE-WGAN hybrid for network intrusion detection on KDD99; generative approach for minority attack augmentation
Modified VAE + Attention-LSTM for network intrusion on NSL-KDD; temporal attention with VAE, 99.37% accuracy
Attention Autoencoder for Generative Latent Representational Learning; attention at bottleneck of AE for anomaly detection
Analysis of Autoencoders for Network Intrusion Detection; systematic comparison of AE variants on KDD99/NSL-KDD
Improving AE-based Network Anomaly Detection on NSL-KDD; architectural improvements to standard AE baseline
